data.author: Aditi Bharade
data.title: Waymo is giving DoorDash drivers money to help shut the doors on its robotaxis
data.description: A Reddit post from a DoorDash rider showed that Waymo had offered $11.25 to have one of its car doors shut.
data.content:
Waymo is paying DoorDash drivers to shut its doors.Brandon Bell/Getty Images
  • Waymo is offering DoorDash drivers a gig to shut car doors left ajar by passengers.

data.author: Amanda Gerut
data.title: Workday shed $40 billion in value. Founder Aneel Bhusri is back with a $139 million bet he can turn it around
data.description: Workday's compensation plan for its new CEO underscores how much of an uphill fight SaaS companies have in the face of AI.
data.content: By bringing cofounder Aneel Bhusri back to the CEO job, Workday has turned to a classic Silicon Valley tradition to deal with the AI threat squeezing software company stocks: the return of the founde… [+7013 chars]

data.title: AI may unleash a 'revenge of the dinosaurs' as corporate giants boost profits, hedge fund exec says
data.description: AI's next phase will shift from Nvidia and cloud leaders to large incumbent companies adopting the technology to boost profits and cut costs.
data.content: Investors are growing jittery about a potential bubble in artificial intelligence stocks, but the real payoff may be just beginning and it could extend well beyond Silicon Valley's usual winners, a $… [+3030 chars]
